title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
Petrol surcharge will be waived off for transactions carried out on the Card. Surcharge will be waived only for transactions with a value between Rs. 400 and Rs. 2,000 
Cash withdrawal limit of Rs. 1,00,000/- at ATMs and POS usage limit of Rs. 1,00,000/- per day. 
Platinum Debit Card can be used online, for shopping, booking air/rail/movie tickets & utility bill payments Discounts at merchant establishments: Platinum Card customers can avail of discounts available at various merchant outlets by making purchases through the Platinum Cards at these merchant locations. 
Platinum Debit Card customers can avail of discounts available at various merchant outlets by making purchases through the Platinum Debit Card at these merchant locations. 
Access ATMs across globe and enjoy higher free limits on transactions.
Dedicated Relationship Manager who can assist you on Investment advisory, Portfolio management and personalized services
  * Free Passbook facility available at home branch for account holders (individuals)


  * Doorstep banking 2 Cash pickup and delivery free per month


  * All the above facilities are made available to you at maintenance of Rs. 1 lakhs as average monthly balance in your Savings Account or Rs. 7.5 lakhs in your Fixed Deposit Account


Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: IDBI Bank offers a wide range of products from savings and current bank account to loans for retail and msme customers  or agri loans to farmers. Apply Now.
metadata.keywords: Internet Banking, savings account, Debit Card, personal loans, home loans, loans, fixed deposits
